purpose: Provide a negative suite fixture whose checked child report is stale.

routing.conflict_resolution: Use fixture-local stale report metadata and keep freshness as the isolated defect.

shared_evidence_rules: Checked children require current member evidence.
Progress ledgers, runtime ids, and PM text cannot satisfy suite closure.

compatibility_notes: The suite map and suite contract schema shapes are valid.
The member report intentionally carries stale metadata.

validation_layers: Suite member path and evidence freshness checks through local check-suite command.
maintenance_ownership: Refresh this fixture after evidence freshness semantics change.
residual_risk: This suite contract covers only the stale-evidence negative branch.
claim_boundary: This suite contract covers only the bad_suite_stale_evidence negative fixture records, member path, and fixture-local stale report. It does not prove runtime checker execution, fixture coverage, CLI checks, tests, suite automation, package publication, code-contract validation, release readiness, or future AI behavior without separate current evidence.
